message:
refactor: extract magic numbers to named constants (gt-0clvj)

Replace inline magic numbers with documented named constants:
- heartbeat.go: 5min/15min stale thresholds → HeartbeatStaleThreshold/HeartbeatVeryStaleThreshold
- boot.go: 30min restart threshold → deaconRestartThreshold
- up.go: 300ms daemon wait → daemonStartupGrace, add comment to maxConcurrentAgentStarts
- dolt_backoff_test.go: 5s/200ms test timeouts → testDeadlockTimeout/testConcurrentHold

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
